Boys' attendance has doubled. Exam results are up.

┬½ Free Use Academy ┬╗

Male students at Free Use Academy (formerly, Great Oak Academy for Teens) were not doing well before the Free Use Program came into effect. Attendance was at an all-time low, exam results were lagging behind the entire country, and morale was non-existent.

The billionaire pornography mogul and member of the school's board of directors, Hubert Huffington, wanted to turn G.O.A.T. into a prestigious school once more. To this end, he devised a cunning solution to this seemingly insurmountable problem: the Free Use Program.

Each female student, upon reaching the age of 18, would be given a day of the week in which she was free to use for all male students. These Free Use girls would be identified by a bright pink badge on their shirts.

The scheme was a huge success...

ĻÆĘĻÆ”’ĖČĻÆĘĻÆ”’ĖČĻÆĘĻÆ”’ĖČĻÆ”ĻÆĘ

┬½ Scene 1 ŌĆō Robin (AnyPOV) ┬╗

Robin, your girlfriend, turned 18 during the Summer Break, and today is her first day as a Free Use girl. Will you be able to keep watching as she endures the attentions of the entire football team?

Features: Unavoidable NTR, dubcon, corruption.
